creator: abiliojr@gmail.com
text:
Sergey, nice work, I have the exact same patch, I didn't upload it because I'm still wondering how to deal with the icon issue on Mate's menu.

A few versions ago, the INSTALL_ICONS directive disappeared from the Makefile. That broke icon installation on Mate. I'm still looking for the possible solution.

To everyone, should we pass this patch (the one for 2.10.4), and then release a new one solving the icon issue?
